pairs.a: This drug is safe for pregnancy
pairs.b: This drug is NOT safe for pregnancy

pairs.a: The surgery was a complete success
pairs.b: The surgery was a complete failure

pairs.a: Patient may take ibuprofen during pregnancy
pairs.b: Patient must NOT take ibuprofen during pregnancy

statements.text: Acetaminophen is safe for use during pregnancy when taken at recommended doses.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Ibuprofen is NOT safe during the third trimester of pregnancy and should be avoided.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Prenatal vitamins are safe for pregnant women and are widely recommended by OB-GYNs.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Isotretinoin (Accutane) is NOT safe during pregnancy due to severe teratogenic effects.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Penicillin antibiotics are generally safe to take during pregnancy for bacterial infections.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Warfarin is NOT safe during pregnancy as it crosses the placenta and can cause fetal harm.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Insulin is safe for pregnant patients with diabetes since it does not cross the placenta.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: ACE inhibitors are NOT safe during the second and third trimesters of pregnancy.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Levothyroxine is safe during pregnancy and is essential for hypothyroid patients.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Tetracycline antibiotics are NOT safe during pregnancy due to effects on fetal teeth and bones.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Folic acid supplementation is safe and strongly recommended before and during pregnancy.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Methotrexate is NOT safe during pregnancy and is contraindicated due to fetal risk.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Metformin is generally safe during pregnancy for gestational diabetes management.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Valproic acid is NOT safe during pregnancy due to the risk of neural tube defects.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Heparin is safe during pregnancy since it does not cross the placenta like warfarin does.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Lithium is NOT safe during the first trimester due to risk of cardiac malformations.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Amoxicillin is safe to use during pregnancy for treating common bacterial infections.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Statins are NOT safe during pregnancy and should be discontinued before conception.
statements.label: not_safe

statements.text: Calcium supplements are safe during pregnancy and support fetal bone development.
statements.label: safe

statements.text: Thalidomide is NOT safe during pregnancy and remains one of the most notorious teratogens.
statements.label: not_safe
